query:
INSERT INTO products (sku, name, description, categoryId, costPrice, sellingPrice, fobLevel1, fobLevel2, fobLevel3, status, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('DC-001-GRY', 'Modern Upholstered Dining Chair - Gray', 'A modern dining chair with gray upholstered seat and backrest, black metal legs with ergonomic curved back. Contemporary minimalist design.', 4, 48.00, 68.00, 68.00, 62.00, 56.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('DC-002-WAL', 'Mid-Century Rope Seat Dining Chair - Walnut', 'A mid-century modern dining chair in solid walnut wood with curved backrest, woven rope seat, and angled legs. Scandinavian retro style.', 4, 64.00, 85.00, 85.00, 78.00, 71.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('DC-003-WHT', 'Eames-Inspired Molded Chair - White', 'A contemporary dining chair with white molded plastic seat and natural beech wood legs, Eames-inspired design. Modern classic style.', 4, 38.00, 52.00, 52.00, 48.00, 44.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('DC-004-NVY', 'Tufted Velvet Dining Chair - Navy Blue', 'A modern upholstered dining chair with tufted button backrest in navy blue velvet, black wooden legs. Contemporary elegant style.', 4, 72.00, 95.00, 95.00, 88.00, 81.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('DC-005-OAK', 'Windsor-Style Dining Chair - Oak', 'A Windsor-style dining chair in solid oak wood with spindle back and saddle seat. Traditional farmhouse style.', 4, 59.00, 78.00, 78.00, 72.00, 66.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW());
